reasons: SPM warning does not affect compilation or runtime
Flutter is gradually migrating to SPM, CocoaPods still supported short-term
portable_pty is too new (v0.0.5) with high migration cost
monitoring_plan: Watch flutter_pty GitHub Issues and Releases
Watch Flutter official SPM migration announcements
Re-evaluate when Flutter makes SPM warning an error

completion_summary.result: No ideal replacement found - recommend staying with flutter_pty
completion_summary.key_finding: kyroon_pty has identical API but same SPM problem; portable_pty solves SPM but has completely different API
completion_summary.next_steps: Monitor Flutter SPM migration progress, re-evaluate when needed
